blended.narrative: Powder King is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 201 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
